4: Abolished the sacred places, broke the stone and destroyed the wooden worship columns; also shattered the bronze snake which had constructed the Moses, because until that the time the Israelites offered to it incense and it had named "Nehushtan" (Bronze Idol of Snake).
16: Needed indeed to take out all the gold with the which the same had covered the doors of the temple of the Lord and the doorposts and to it give to the king of the Assyrians
31: Don't listen to Hezekiah ! The king of the Assyria to listen : Make peace with me , he says , and surrender to me , and then will can each of you to eat from the vineyard his and the fig tree his , and to drink water from the cistern his ,
